education.description: Projects: Full-Stack Web Application, REST API Development, Database Design
coursework: Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Databases, Computer Networks, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Computer Architecture, Discrete Mathematics, and Probability & Statistics.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description:
Delivered end-to-end software solutions for diverse clients, designing scalable back-end architectures, RESTful APIs, and data-driven applications while leveraging cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

Led full project lifecycles from requirements gathering to deployment, developed web and automation solutions (Python, Node.js, JavaScript), optimized databases (SQL/NoSQL), implemented CI/CD pipelines, ensured security best practices, and provided technical consulting across system design, performance optimization, and digital transformation initiatives.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description:
Designed and developed scalable enterprise applications, implemented RESTful APIs and microservices architectures, collaborated in Agile/Scrum teams, optimized database performance, integrated cloud services (AWS/Azure), ensured code quality through unit and integration testing, and contributed to CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment.

Gathered and analyzed business requirements with stakeholders, translated functional specifications into technical solutions, performed code reviews and refactoring to improve maintainability, monitored application performance in production environments, resolved critical incidents, and mentored junior developers while ensuring compliance with security and industry best practices.

personal.name: Alejandro Moral Aranda
personal.about: Senior Software Engineer with expertise in back-end development, microservices architecture, and cloud computing.
